purpose: Pre-F1 intake-approve threw 'Permission denied: lacks priv:tier-1-intake-approve' under default-operator identity. Driver script swallowed with `|| true`, so M09/M10 silently never got approved and later refused dispatch. With L0 envelope, this MUST emit policy-refusal with structured remediation.
anti_pattern_being_tested: Silent || true in serial-by-module.sh script. Layer 0 doctrine: no silent errors; every refusal goes through the structured envelope.
